AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Fresh Fruit Bananas Yellow. A versatile product with Rainforest Alliance certification, it's ideal for snacking, baking, and smoothies. Shop now!
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Fresh Fruit Bananas Yellow are versatile Cavendish bananas, a delicious choice for their naturally sweet flavour. These ripe bananas are ideal for snacking, baking, and delicious smoothies. They are also Rainforest Alliance certified.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose bananas based on your usage. For peak flavour today or tomorrow, select yellow bananas with light brown flecks.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy these ripe bananas as a convenient snack, in fruit salads, or blended into refreshing smoothies. They are also excellent for baking.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store bananas at room temperature to ripen. Refrigerating stops ripening and may blacken skins, though the fruit remains edible.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Baking.</section>

Products.Name: Hass Avocado

CentreTag.TagContent: 2 for $3.00 - $1.50/1EA

Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Hass Avocado' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Hass Avocado! Creamy, rich, and perfect for delicious salads, sandwiches, or guacamole. A versatile choice for any meal. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Hass Avocados offer a rich, creamy texture and flavour. These versatile fruits add a buttery touch to meals. Their pebbly skin darkens as they ripen.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose avocados that are firm but yield gently to pressure when ripe. Skin changes from green to dark purplish-black. Avoid soft spots.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Ripen firm avocados at room temperature until soft. Once ripe, store in the refrigerator for up to five days.
</section>

<section><header>How to Prepare:</header> Cut avocado lengthwise around the central seed. Twist halves apart, tap seed with knife to remove. Scoop out creamy green flesh.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy Hass avocados mashed for guacamole, sliced in salads and sandwiches, or on toast. They add creamy richness to smoothies and tacos.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Grill, bake.</section>

Attributes.Html: 2 for $3.00 - $1.50/1EA

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Fresh Pink Lady Apples. A premium product with a naturally sweet taste, it's ideal for a delicious snack. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Fresh Pink Lady Apples are a premium choice with a naturally sweet taste and dense, firm flesh. These apples offer an almost effervescent flavour, making them a delightful snack or versatile cooking ingredient.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose apples that are firm and free from bruises or soft spots. Look for a vibrant colour.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy Pink Lady Apples raw as a crisp snack or sliced in salads. They are also excellent baked in pies, crumbles, or roasted alongside savoury dishes.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store Pink Lady Apples in the crisper drawer of your refrigerator to maintain freshness and crisp texture. They will keep well for several weeks.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, stew, roast, grill, sauté.</section>

Products.Name: Onion Brown
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Onion Brown' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Onion Brown is your essential choice for flavouring meals and dishes. It's great roasted or raw, making it simple to prepare and enjoy. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
These are the most common onions and are available all year round. They are strongly flavoured, firm onions with layers of golden brown paper skins and white flesh. Edible portion includes flesh only. Generally used for cooking rather than eaten raw.

What to look for
Choose onions with firm flesh and dry papery outer skin. Avoid those with green shoots or soft spots.

Availability
All year.

Store
Store in a cool, dark, well ventilated place. Do not put them in plastic bags; if purchased in plastic, remove as soon as possible. Avoid refrigerating or storing with any food that may absorb their flavour.

How to prepare
Remove skin and root, cut as required; slice, dice, wedge or leave whole. Braising; blanch first. Roasting; skin can be left on when roasted whole. Stuffing; peel, cut off top, scoop out centre to leave 1 cm shell. The release of oil during peeling brings tears to the eyes – there is no guaranteed way of avoiding this. The best advice is to peel and slice quickly. To peel large quantities of pickling onions, top and tail, then cover with boiling water for 5 minutes, drain and remove the skins which will slip off easily.

Ways to eat
Onions can be eaten raw, cooked or pickled. In many recipes, onions add flavour and texture. They can be used in soups, braises, stews, pizzas, pies, pasta dishes, salads, sandwiches, sauces, chutneys and stir fries.

Cooking Methods
Boil, microwave, roast, steam, stir fry, braise, stew.

Products.Name: Mandarin Imperial
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Mandarin Imperial' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Enjoy Mandarin Imperial, perfect for a refreshing snack. With its easy-to-peel skin and sweet, juicy taste, it's a favourite. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Imperial Mandarins are a popular citrus fruit, cherished for their bright, sweet flavour and easy-to-peel skin. These juicy mandarins are a delightful snack, perfect for school lunchboxes or as a refreshing treat. They offer a burst of sunshine in every segment.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose mandarins that feel firm and heavy for their size, indicating juiciness. Look for a bright, even orange colour and avoid any with soft spots or blemishes.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy Imperial Mandarins fresh as a simple, refreshing snack. Their segments are a delicious addition to fruit salads, or you can use the zest and juice in baking and marinades. They also complement savoury dishes like poultry and seafood.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store mandarins at room temperature for up to a week. For longer freshness, keep them in the crisper drawer of your refrigerator, where they can last for several weeks.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Juice, zest, incorporate into baking, marinades, sauces, or glazes for a citrusy tang.</section>

Products.Name: Woolworths White Flat Mushrooms Punnet

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Woolworths White Flat Mushrooms is your versatile choice for your next BBQ. Grown in Australia, it's simple to prepare. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths White Flat Mushrooms are proudly Australian grown, offering a hearty, earthy flavour. Perfect for grilling and cooking, they add rich taste and satisfying texture.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose firm, smooth mushrooms with an even colour. Avoid soft spots, shrivelled edges, or excess moisture.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store in their punnet or a paper bag in the refrigerator. This keeps them fresh. Avoid airtight containers, which cause spoilage.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Ideal for barbecuing, sautéing, roasting, or stuffing. Enjoy as a flavourful side, in burgers, or a meat-free option.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, barbecue, grill, roast, sauté, stir-fry.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> These flat mushrooms are proudly Australian grown by our partners, Costa Mushrooms. They are available year-round, harvested fresh.</section>

Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Potato White Washed' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: White Washed Potatoes: a versatile staple for any meal. Smooth skin, simple to prep. Perfect for baking, mashing, or chips! Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
White Washed Potatoes

A potato is a kind of root vegetable that ranges in size and shape, including round, oval and elongated. Potato skin colour can be red, pink, white, cream, yellow and purple. Potatoes are versatile vegetables that can be enjoyed as a side with many meals. The whole potato can be eaten – skin included – and should always be washed and cooked. Barbecue, bake, boil, or blitz them into a soup. Mashed potatoes are a classic family favourite, or slice potatoes into chips.

White washed potatoes have white or cream smooth skin with cream coloured flesh.

Products.Name: Red Capsicum
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Red Capsicum' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Looking to add vibrant colour and flavour to your meals? Red Capsicum is a fresh, versatile choice for cooking. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Red Capsicum offers a vibrant colour and a distinct sweet, mild flavour. This versatile vegetable is a popular choice for adding a fresh crunch to salads or a rich depth to cooked dishes.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose capsicums that are firm, glossy, and brightly coloured. Avoid any with soft spots, wrinkles, or visible blemishes.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy red capsicum raw in fresh salads, sandwiches, or as a crunchy snack. It's also delicious roasted, grilled, stir-fried, or added to stews, curries, and sauces. Try stuffing them for a hearty meal.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store red capsicums unwashed in the crisper drawer of your refrigerator. They will typically stay fresh for up to one week.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, barbecue, grill, roast, sauté, stir-fry.</section>

<section>Mandarin Amorette® Seedless are bright orange citrus fruits with an easy-to-peel skin. These juicy mandarins offer a sweet, tangy, and refreshing flavour, perfect for a convenient snack. Their seedless quality makes them simple to enjoy.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose mandarins that feel firm and heavy for their size, with a vibrant orange skin. Avoid any with soft spots, mould, or discolouration.

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store mandarins at room temperature for up to a few days, or refrigerate them in the crisper drawer to extend their freshness for up to two weeks. Ensure good air circulation.</section>

Products.Name: Fresh Broccoli
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Fresh Broccoli' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Fresh Broccoli. A versatile product with deep green florets, it's ideal for salads, stir-fries, or as a side. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
A vegetable with deep green flower clusters which form the head, and pale green stems,
with firm stalks that snap easily. Avoid using broccoli with yellowed
leaves or yellow flowers through the buds.

Availability
All Year.

Store
Keep refrigerated. Use promptly.

How to prepare:
Trim stalks and divide heads into even sized portions. The stalks can be
left attached to the florets. Alternatively, stalks can be removed,
sliced finely and used in stir fries and soups; or julienned and used
in coleslaw. Broccoli is usually eaten cooked ? however, cook only
until tender and still slightly crisp.
Cook using methods such as steaming, microwaving and stir frying.
To blanch, simply place portions in boiling water for 1-2 minutes,
drain and cool under cold running water.
Blanching improves taste, colour and texture.

Ways to eat
Broccoli is one of the most versatile vegetables. It can be served raw or
lightly blanched and used in salads, pasta dishes, omelettes, quiches,
soups and as a side dish.

Cooking Methods
Boil, steam, microwave, roast, stir fry.

Products.Name: Eat Later Cavendish Bananas
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Eat Later Cavendish Bananas' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Eat Later Cavendish Bananas are your versatile choice for future enjoyment. They ripen at home in 2-4 days. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Eat later bananas will ripen at home in 2-4 days.
Cavendish is the most popular banana variety in Australia, with firm, starchy flesh, available all year round.
Bananas are perfect for snacking, used in baking, fruit salads and smoothies.

How to Pick:
Select bananas based on your usage timeframe and how you'll want to eat or use them, selecting Eat Later bananas to allow ripening at home in 2 - 4 days for consumption later in the week.

Bananas should be plump and firm, avoiding depressed and dark spots.

How to Store:
Store bananas at room temperature where they will continue to ripen. Eat later bananas are best for ripening at home in 2-4 days at ambient temperature.

Where it's Grown:
Australian Cavendish Bananas are grown in tropical and sub tropical regions. The tropical banana growing regions of Nothern Queensland, mainly around Tully and Innisfail, produce more than 90% of Australia's Bananas. Other production areas are in the NT, WA in Carnarvon, Northern NSW and Bundaberg in Southern Queensland.

Health Benefits:
Bananas contain potassium for heathy muscle function, and are high in energy-supprting vitamin B6* 

*Based on one large cavendish banana, or 2 medium lady finger bananas (150g), as part of a healthy balanced diet

AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Sweet Potato Gold each provides a naturally sweet and earthy flavour, perfect for adding golden colour and comforting taste to your meals. These versatile root vegetables are a popular staple in Australian kitchens.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Select firm sweet potatoes with smooth, unblemished skin. Avoid soft spots or sprouts.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy roasted, mashed, or baked whole. Perfect for soups, stews, curries, or fried as chips. Their natural sweetness enhances many savoury dishes.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Keep in a cool, dark, well-ventilated pantry. Do not refrigerate, as cold temperatures can affect texture.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, boil, barbecue, fry, mash, roast, steam, stir-fry.</section>

Products.Name: Carrot Fresh
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Carrot Fresh' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover fresh, versatile carrots, perfect for healthy snacks or delicious meals. Rich in Vitamin A and fibre. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Woolworth's Select Carrot are selected fresh from Australian farms, the ever versatile carrots is perfect for cooking or eating raw as a fresh snack. Edible portion includes flesh only. 

What to look for
Choose carrots that are firm, well formed, with a good orange colour. 

Availability
All year.

Store
Refrigerate in plastic bags.

How to prepare
Trim ends and peel. Cut as required. Popular grated, finely sliced or diced for salads and juiced. Wash well or lightly scrape to ensure all soil is removed. Cut into rings, cubes, strips, or chunks. 

Ways to eat
They can be eaten raw as snacks, or cooked and used in savoury and some sweet dishes, such as carrot cake or muffins. Carrots should be cooked until they are tender and depending on preference, still slightly crunchy. Cooked, tender carrots may be mashed or pur?ed.

Cooking Methods
Bake, barbecue, boil, braise, microwave, roast, steam, stew, stir fry.

Products.Name: Fresh Granny Smith Apples
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Fresh Granny Smith Apples' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Fresh Granny Smith Apples. A crisp and juicy product with tangy flavour, ideal for snacking or cooking. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Fresh Granny Smith Apples are a popular choice, known for their vibrant green skin and crisp texture. These juicy apples offer a distinctly tangy and zesty flavour, perfect as a refreshing dessert or for cooking into delicious sauces.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose apples that are firm and heavy, with bright green, unblemished skin. Avoid any with soft spots or bruises.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy these crisp apples fresh as a snack, sliced into salads for a tangy crunch, or paired with cheese. Their zesty flavour is ideal for apple pies, crumbles, and homemade applesauce. They are also a refreshing addition to smoothies.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store Granny Smith apples in the crisper drawer of your refrigerator. This helps maintain their crispness and flavour for several weeks.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, stew, sauté, roast, poach.</section>

Products.Name: Strawberries Punnet
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Strawberries Punnet' has a supply limit of 15. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Strawberries. A delicious product, firm, sweet, and juicy, it's ideal for snacking or desserts. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Strawberries are firm, sweet and juicy red fruit. 

How to Pick:
Pick firm strawberries with a red and glossy appearance that are free from bruising. Fresh looking green stems are a sign of freshness! 

How to Store:
Store strawberries in their punnets or in a covered container in the refrigerator.

Where it's Grown:
Depending on seasonality, Australian strawberries are grown all year round across different regions.
In winter, most are grown in Queensland and Western Australia while in summer, most come from Victoria, South Australia and Tasmania.

Health Benefits:
Strawberries are packed with vitamin C to support a healthy immune system, and are high in folate.

*Based on 1 cup strawberries (150g), as part of a healthy balanced diet

Products.Name: Onion Red
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Onion Red' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Onion Red. A versatile product with mild, sweet, and juicy flavour, it's ideal for salads and cooking. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Red onions have burgundy red skins and red tinged flesh. Spanish type red onions are large and round, while Californian red onions tend to be flatter and milder. They are mild, sweet and juicy and are delicious eaten raw in salads, used as a garnish or added to sandwiches.

What to look for
Choose onions with firm flesh and dry papery outer skin. Avoid those with green shoots or soft spots.

Availability
All year.

Store
Store in a cool, dark, well ventilated place. Do not put them in plastic bags; if purchased in plastic, remove as soon as possible. Avoid refrigerating or storing with any food that may absorb their flavour.

How to prepare
Remove skin and root, cut as required; slice, dice, wedge or leave whole. Braising; blanch first. Roasting; skin can be left on when roasted whole. Stuffing; peel, cut off top, scoop out centre to leave 1 cm shell. The release of oil during peeling brings tears to the eyes – there is no guaranteed way of avoiding this. The best advice is to peel and slice quickly. To peel large quantities of pickling onions, top and tail, then cover with boiling water for 5 minutes, drain and remove the skins which will slip off easily.

Ways to eat
Onions can be eaten raw, cooked or pickled. In many recipes, onions add flavour and texture. They can be used in soups, braises, stews, pizzas, pies, pasta dishes, salads, sandwiches, sauces, chutneys and stir fries.

Cooking Methods
Boil, microwave, roast, steam, stir fry, braise, stew.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Continental Cucumbers are crisp, long, and slender, offering a refreshing and mild flavour. Perfect for adding a delicate crunch to salads or enjoying as a cool snack, these Australian-grown cucumbers are a versatile choice.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose cucumbers that are firm to the touch and have a uniform dark green colour. Avoid any with soft spots, wrinkles, or yellowing.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store your Continental Cucumbers in the refrigerator to maintain their freshness and crisp texture. Keep them dry and away from ripening fruits.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> These refreshing Continental Cucumbers are proudly Australian Grown, ensuring local freshness for your kitchen. They are available year-round from various Australian regions.</section>

Products.Name: Woolworths Broccolini Bunch

CentreTag.TagContent: 2 for $5.00 - $2.50/1EA

Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Woolworths Broccolini Bunch' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Woolworths Broccolini Bunch is your versatile choice for everyday meals. It's easy to prepare, making it simple to enjoy. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
This is a natural cross between broccoli and Chinese broccoli (gai lan).
It has a long slender stem topped with small flowering buds that are
a cross between broccoli florets and an asparagus tip.

Availability
All Year.

Store
Refrigerate in reusable plastic bags. Use promptly.

How to prepare
Trim stalks and divide heads into even sized portions. The stalks can
be left attached to the florets. Alternatively, stalks can be removed,
sliced finely and used in stir fries and soups; or julienned and used in
coleslaw. Broccolini is usually eaten cooked ? however, cook only until
tender and still slightly crisp. Cook using methods such as steaming,
microwaving and stir frying. To blanch, simply place portions in boiling
water for 1-2 minutes, drain and cool under cold running water.
Blanching improves taste, colour and texture.

Ways to eat
Broccolini is one of the most versatile vegetables. It can be served raw
or lightly blanched and used in salads, pasta dishes, omelettes,
quiches, soups and as a side dish.

Cooking Methods
Blanch, steam, microwave, roast, stir fry.
